metadata.description: Internal AgileFreaks skills library for Claude Code and Claude.ai Cowork.

plugins.name: test-writing
plugins.description: Test-writing methodology based on Robert C. Martin's testing discipline: decides what to test, how many tests to write, and at which pyramid level — for TDD, new/changed code, and backfilling untested code.

plugins.name: dep-update-merge
plugins.description: Bundles open dependency-update PRs/MRs into a single verified change with changelog analysis, breaking change triage, and build/test verification.

plugins.name: code-review
plugins.description: Outside-in, risk-driven code review methodology based on Gregory Brown's Effective Code Reviews. Covers all change types: bug fixes, new features, enhancements, and refinements.

plugins.name: android-project-starter
plugins.description: Wizard-driven scaffolder for Android projects using a multi-module MVI + Compose + Koin architecture. Generates build-logic, core, feature modules, version catalog, navigation, DI, tooling (Spotless/detekt), CI, and project-local Claude skills.

plugins.name: android-project-aligner
plugins.description: Audits an existing Android project against the android-project-starter conventions, produces a phased migration plan, and applies it on a fresh git branch with build verification at every step. Companion to android-project-starter for brownfield codebases. Also generates the project-local <project>-android-planner and <project>-android-implementer skills.
